PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Shelf for Carole McManus.

Ms. Shelf stated that she responded to everything to the best of their knowledge in the supplemental declaration she filed. Ms. Shelf also stated that publication of the decedent's separate property was in the spousal property petition and that they determined that only one publication was paying small royalties which can be collected by 13100's. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)
